prompt: I have a Python file at /tmp/sample_code.py and I want to embed it with Voyage AI and store it in my Pinecone index called code-corpus-voyage under the namespace 'pono'. Walk me through it and write the command I should run.

assertions.text: Recommends voyage-code-3 as the model for code
References the canonical script at scripts/embed_and_upsert.py from this skill
Specifies input_type=document for upsert (or notes default)
Notes that Pinecone MCP search-records won't work for standard indexes (CLI fallback)
Provides an exact runnable command with --index, --namespace, --model flags
